code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut cur = 0
    mut has = false
    mut neg = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          if has
            let v = if neg
              0 - cur
            else
              cur
            end
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
            cur = 0
            has = false
            neg = false
          end
        else if b == 45
          neg = true
        else
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has
      let v = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    end

    mut out = ""
    mut idx = 0
    mut first = true
    let total = nums.len()
    while idx < total
      match nums.get(idx)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      idx = idx + 2
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
